credentials.name: tftBackendApi
credentials.description: Bearer token auth for backend API. Created in n8n UI Settings -> Credentials. Header Name: Authorization, Header Prefix: Bearer (with space), Header Value: API_SECRET_KEY from .env

credentials.name: discordWebhook
credentials.description: Discord webhook URL for patch monitor failure notifications. Created in n8n UI Settings -> Credentials. Set the URL field to your Discord channel webhook URL (https://discord.com/api/webhooks/...).
